entity.country_or_origin: Saint Vincent and the Grenadines / Vietnam
entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in July 2019 and operated by bitcastle LLC, a Saint Vincent and the Grenadines-registered company with an operational address in Hanoi, Vietnam.
entity.notes: The official About page identifies a July 2019 launch. Official terms identify bitcastle LLC as registered in Saint Vincent and the Grenadines, while the company also lists an operational address in Hanoi, Vietnam.

events.title: bitCastle beta release announced
events.description: bitCastle announced plans to release a beta version of its cryptocurrency exchange ahead of the platform's public launch later in 2019.
events.notes: The announcement describes the planned beta release rather than the final public launch.

events.title: bitcastle launched
events.description: bitcastle launched as a global centralized cryptocurrency exchange in July 2019.
events.notes: The official source identifies July 2019 but not a precise day, so the first day of the month is used as a month-level date placeholder.

evidence.title: bitcastle Terms of Use
evidence.notes: Official terms identify bitcastle LLC as the exchange operator and give its Saint Vincent and the Grenadines registration.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for bitcastle
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile used to corroborate the current bitcastle exchange identity.

evidence.title: About bitcastle
evidence.notes: Official company page states that bitcastle launched in July 2019 and lists the operator's registration and operational address.

evidence.title: New cryptocurrency exchange bitCastle announces beta release
evidence.notes: Company-operated media article records the planned beta release before the July 2019 launch.
